channel.title: Signal//log
channel.description: A running transmission of half-formed thoughts, sketched before they cool into language. Pages that perform their ideas instead of explaining them.

item.title: The Continuous Experiment
item.description: If every life is already an experiment — anonymous, ambient, distributed — what would we finally be able to see?

item.title: The Shrinking Spectrum
item.description: On how the cone of possible futures narrows with age — and why what remains is not less.
